object_a.label: picture frame
object_a.description: Square white-framed coastal scene higher on wall
object_a.long_form_open_description: Light-colored (white) frame containing a small, colorful coastal or beach illustration. Mounted on the sloping stair wall above and slightly right of the central framed sailboat print.
object_a.location_relative_to_other_objects: Above and slightly right of the central black-framed picture and left of the top-right frame

object_a.object_text_long: center sector | Light-colored (white) frame containing a small, colorful coastal or beach illustration. Mounted on the sloping stair wall above and slightly right of the central framed sailboat print.

object_b.label: ceiling light
object_b.description: vaulted ceiling with high peak and recessed vent
object_b.long_form_open_description: High vaulted ceiling sloping up toward center of room with smooth white finish; includes an air vent near the peak. Ceiling height increases perception of space and daylight from right-side windows.
object_b.location_relative_to_other_objects: above the fireplace wall and seating area, spanning left-to-right across the room
